title: Opening for Financial Analyst at HDFC Bank

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at HDFC Bank
jsonLd.description:
HDFC Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
